widget.name: Convey Modal Popup
widget.description: Dockable side modal with Data view–like content, header drag repositioning, shared bottom dock, and configurable size, colors, and borders.

property.caption: Title
property.description: Text shown in the maximized panel header and on the minimized dock tab. Supports expressions and attribute values (e.g. 'Address Change' or $Request/Name).

property.caption: Trigger
property.description: Drop zone for widgets that open the modal when clicked (for example an Action Button, Icon, or Image). Configure either Trigger, Is open, or both. Nested clickable widgets inside the trigger will also open the modal.

property.caption: Data source
property.description: Optional single object that provides context to Content widgets, similar to a Data view. Configure Context, Microflow, Nanoflow, or Listen to widget. Leave empty if Content widgets use page context or their own nested Data views. Requires Mendix 11.11+.

property.caption: Content
property.description: Drop zone for the panel body. Place Text boxes, buttons, or any page widgets here. When Data source is set, nested widgets receive that object context (like inside a Data view) and can bind its attributes. Content stays mounted while minimized so form values are preserved until the modal is closed.

property.caption: Is open
property.description: Optional Boolean attribute for two-way open/close control from microflows or nanoflows. Set true to open maximized; set false to close and remove the dock tab. The widget also writes to this attribute when the user opens or closes the modal. Place the widget in a context that provides this attribute (for example inside a Data view).

property.caption: Dock position
property.description: Side of the viewport where the maximized panel appears (home position before any drag). Right docks to the right edge; Left docks to the left edge.

property.caption: Width
property.description: CSS width of the maximized panel. Examples: 480px, 40%, 30vw. Required.

property.caption: Height
property.description: CSS height of the maximized panel. Examples: 100%, 90vh, 800px. Required. Use with Top offset when the panel should not cover the full viewport height.

property.caption: Top offset
property.description: CSS top position of the maximized panel. Examples: 0, 64px, 10vh. Use this to clear a top navigation bar.

property.caption: Z-index
property.description: Stacking order for the overlay and panel. The panel uses Z-index + 1. The shared dock bar uses a fixed z-index of 1100. Keep panel Z-index below 1100 if dock tabs must stay clickable above the panel.

property.caption: Enable drag
property.description: When true, the user can drag the maximized panel by its header to any position on the screen. Form fields in Content remain usable (only the header is the drag handle). Minimize, maximize, and close still work normally. The dragged position is kept while minimized and resets when the modal is closed.

property.caption: When multiple open
property.description: How maximized panels are arranged when more than one Convey Modal Popup is open on the same dock side. Open beside places each new panel next to earlier ones (first at the edge, next beside it). Overlap stacks them on top of each other at the dock edge (previous behavior).

property.caption: Icon class
property.description: Optional CSS class name for an icon shown before the title in the header and dock tab. Example from Atlas/Glyphicons: glyphicon glyphicon-file. Leave empty for no icon.

property.caption: Show overlay
property.description: When true, a dimmed overlay covers the page behind the maximized panel. When false, the page remains fully visible and interactive under the panel.

property.caption: Close on overlay click
property.description: When true and Show overlay is enabled, clicking the dimmed overlay closes the modal (same as the header Close button).

property.caption: Overlay color
property.description: Background color of the page dimmer. Accepts any CSS color: #000000, rgb(0,0,0), or rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12). Lower alpha = lighter overlay.

property.caption: Panel background
property.description: Background color of the maximized panel shell. Accepts hex, rgb, or rgba. Example: #ffffff.

property.caption: Header background
property.description: Background color of the panel header bar (title and controls). Example: #ffffff or #f8fafc.

property.caption: Body background
property.description: Background color of the scrollable content area below the header. Example: #ffffff or #f5f7f9.

property.caption: Title color
property.description: Text color for the panel title and optional header icon. Example: #1a2b4b.

property.caption: Control color
property.description: Color of the Minimize (−) and Close (×) icons in the panel header. Example: #1a2b4b.

property.caption: Header border color
property.description: Color of the 1px divider line under the header. Example: #e8eaed.

property.caption: Panel border color
property.description: Border color around the maximized panel. Only visible when Panel border width is greater than 0. Example: #e5e7eb or #2b5ce7.

property.caption: Panel border width
property.description: CSS border width for the maximized panel. Use 0 or 0px for no border; use 1px or 2px to show a border with Panel border color.

property.caption: Panel border radius
property.description: CSS border-radius for the maximized panel corners. Use 0 for a flush side panel; use 8px or 12px for rounded corners.

property.caption: Panel box shadow
property.description: Optional CSS box-shadow override. Leave empty to keep the default side shadow. Example: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18).

property.caption: Tab background
property.description: Background (fill) color of the minimized dock tab pill. Use different pastel colors per modal instance to distinguish them. Examples: #cfe8ff, #ffe4c4, #d4edda, #f8d7da.

property.caption: Tab text color
property.description: Color of the dock tab title text and the Maximize / Close icons. Example: #1a2b4b.

property.caption: Tab border color
property.description: Border color of the minimized dock tab. Only visible when Tab border width is greater than 0. Example: rgba(26, 43, 75, 0.06) or #cbd5e1.

property.caption: Tab border width
property.description: CSS border width for the dock tab. Use 0 or 0px for no border; use 1px (default) for a light outline.

property.caption: Tab border radius
property.description: CSS border-radius for the dock tab pill. Examples: 8px, 12px, 999px (fully rounded).

property.caption: On open
property.description: Action (microflow, nanoflow, or Call nanoflow) executed when the modal opens from a closed state (trigger click or Is open set to true). Not fired when restoring from minimized.

property.caption: On close
property.description: Action executed when the modal is fully closed (header Close, dock tab Close, Escape key, overlay click if enabled, or Is open set to false). Use this to clear draft data or refresh lists.

property.caption: On minimize
property.description: Action executed when the user clicks Minimize in the panel header. The modal becomes a dock tab; content stays mounted.

property.caption: On maximize
property.description: Action executed when the user restores the modal from a dock tab (Maximize on the tab). Not fired on the initial open from closed.
